metadata.description: 👾 Flutter skills for Claude Code by UtopiaSoftware - hooks-based state management, project architecture scaffolding, BLoC migration, and admin/CMS panels.

plugins.name: utopia-hooks
plugins.description: 👾 Flutter state management with utopia_hooks. Screen/State/View pattern, hook catalog, global state, async/pagination patterns, app bootstrap, global error handling, navigation conventions, hook-state testing, utopia_cli integration (describe / add screen / doctor / MCP), and enforcement of conventions via SessionStart project detection + PostToolUse checks.

plugins.name: utopia-ai-arch
plugins.description: 👾 Create and maintain the Claude Code .claude/ layer (agents, skills, slash commands, enforcement hooks, settings.json, refs, claude-architecture.md decision log) for Utopia Flutter projects. Encodes the project-claude-layer blueprint plus invariants distilled from production implementations. Use when bootstrapping a repo's AI architecture, adding a skill/agent/command/hook script, recording a rejected alternative, auditing for drift, or diagnosing why the agent keeps forgetting a project convention.

plugins.name: utopia-hooks-migrate-bloc
plugins.description: 👾 Migrate Flutter BLoC/Cubit codebases to utopia_hooks. Two-phase migration (global states first, then screens) with per-commit granularity, dart analyze baseline, screen-local vs global Cubit classification, and universal pattern-family handling. Includes /utopia-hooks-migrate-bloc:migrate orchestrator coordinating inventory, foundation, global-state, screen, and review sub-agents.

plugins.name: utopia-cms
plugins.description: 👾 Flutter CMS / admin panels with utopia_cms. CmsWidget shell, CmsTablePage, CmsDelegate (Firebase / Supabase / Hasura / GraphQL), CmsEntry catalog, filters, custom actions, management sections. PostToolUse hook flags the hand-rolled DataTable + service + state-class anti-pattern.
